codeReview.summary: ToolRegistry implementation in registry.rs correctly provides register(), get(), and list() methods as specified. MCP-compatible schemas are provided via the Tool trait's input_schema() method returning serde_json::Value (JSON Schema). Tool discovery is implemented via list_names(), list(), list_categories(), list_by_category(), and contains() methods. The commit 491e98c was a minor clippy fix (unused mut removal), indicating the feature was already complete. Implementation uses proper async locking (RwLock) for concurrent access and handles edge cases correctly.

summary: PASS - The tools-registry feature is fully implemented and verified. ToolRegistry with register/get/list methods, MCP-compatible schemas via input_schema(), and tool discovery capability all work correctly. Worker correctly verified existing implementation passes all tests: cargo build --workspace succeeds, cargo test -p swell-tools -- registry passes 2 tests (test_registry_empty, test_registry_registration), cargo test -p swell-tools passes all 20 tests, and cargo clippy produces no warnings.
